title: Aerial Hell
description:
Aerial Hell : Sky Dimension & Dungeons, Bosses.

Explore the new floating islands dimension, alone or with your friends !
body: **Welcome to the Aerial Hell dimension !** **Mod developped for Forge 1.16.5, 1.18.2, and 1.20.1** This mod adds a new dimension called Aerial Hell, a dimension of floating islands, including a lot of new creatures and dungeons. Alone or with your friends, explore this new dimension, build, and if you wish, go fight the dungeon bosses. [![Aerial Hell Trailer](https://img.youtube.com/vi/wmbtbAo_Vjo/0.jpg)](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=wmbtbAo_Vjo) If you want to know more about the mod, I invite you to go to the [Official Wiki](https://github.com/nicochart/AerialHell/wiki). Roughly Enough Items (REI) compatibility : OK **Acknowledgement :** Thanks to [Telepathic Grunt](https://github.com/TelepathicGrunt) (RepurposedStructures, and many others, mod developer) for his tutorial and personal help for structure development which was very useful for me. Thanks to Andreas Zoeller for personally allowing me to use his music "Sweden by C418 Re​-​Orchestration" in my mod Finally, thanks to all the Faction Bedrock team for their support -- Whole mod development : [nicochart](https://github.com/nicochart) Musics : much made by TomMaup using [Groovepad App](https://play.google.com/store/apps/details?id=com.easybrain.make.music&hl=fr&gl=US&pli=1), some from [Zapsplat Website](https://www.zapsplat.com/), and [Sweden (by C418) Re-Orchestration by Andreas Zoeller](https://andreaszoeller.bandcamp.com/track/sweden-re-orchestration). Sounds : a lot from [Mixkit website](https://mixkit.co/), and some from [La Sonotheque](https://lasonotheque.org/). Structures Builders : Bababinkss, Astre01, Origame, TomMaup, Tanio and Jb (Lunatic Temple participation), Astre01 (cottage), nicochart (all others structures) Mod testers : TomMaup, nicochart, Fakaz, Origame Trailer actors : TomMaup, IronVortex, Astre01, Origame, Fakaz, nicochart Artistic side +huge general participation for the mod : Cixon Lunatic Temple textures by Parrazarre Entity models made with BlockBench Thanks Qra and Cixon for the new logos (Curseforge logo by Cixon) Thanks Dasawkem, Pinwheel and aarter for reporting bugs Thanks Pinwheel for this amazing bosses fanart
